scene: 3x3 storyboard grid — Episode 03 vocal continuation at tree, three lyric phrases

reference_images.extract: exact face, gold hoops, gold necklace, sun-yellow sleeveless dress, wet dark wavy hair, barefoot
reference_images.apply_to: Nia in panels 2-9 — same woman, same wet look as end of episode 02

blend_instructions: Image 1 for identity only. Scene is woods at night, hand on tree trunk — do not copy Image 1 layout.

global_style.weather: night forest, torrential rain, ground level only

panels.description: Medium close continuation — Nia at wet trunk, hand on bark, rain, exhausted, lips parted before first lyric
Lip sync line 1 — singing Sinking in this river, eyes searching upward, rain on face
Close on mouth mid-phrase can't see the light of day, wet hair on cheeks
Breath gap — eyes closed, rain on lashes, chest heaving, fingers on bark
Line 2 — shoulders slump, singing weigh me down, slow push-in energy
Lightning flash across eyes mid-line 2, gold hoops glint
Line 3 intense — Drowning in my sorrows, jaw tense, most desperate delivery
Fingers tighten on bark, singing might drown, rain streaks
Hold after last word — empty mouth opening for breath, rain, thunder mood, still no vista

must_include: hand on tree in most panels
